{{Quote|Looks like the Black Sun are going to try and smuggle out a cargo of Death Star salvage.|[[Osae Meilea]]|<ref name="SWG:CtBScs" />}}
The '''''Lupus Maroo''''' was a medium freighter used by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] organization. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the ship was used to transport salvage of the destroyed [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] from the moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Before it could jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the freighter was intercepted by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] paid by [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] enforcer [[Osae Meilea]] and forced to return to the moon. It landed in a remote spot of the moon, where Meilea and a team were already waiting to capture the ship and retrieve the cargo.<ref name="SWG:CtBScs" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
